summary: Tested DB Backup Export/Import feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified Export Database card, Import Database card, Collections panel with all 12 collections, import preview dialog with merge/replace modes, and per-collection import results.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/backup/stats - Admin can get collection counts including agent_targets
Backend: GET /api/backup/stats - Returns all 12 collections with total_records
Backend: GET /api/backup/stats - Agent gets 403 (correctly denied)
Backend: GET /api/backup/stats - Unauthenticated gets 401/403
Backend: GET /api/backup/download - Admin can download JSON backup file
Backend: GET /api/backup/download - Returns all collections with metadata
Backend: GET /api/backup/download - Agent gets 403 (correctly denied)
Backend: POST /api/backup/import - Admin can import with merge mode
Backend: POST /api/backup/import - Admin can import with replace mode
Backend: POST /api/backup/import - Agent gets 403 (correctly denied)
Backend: POST /api/backup/import - Invalid JSON returns 400
Backend: POST /api/backup/import - Merge mode skips duplicates
Backend: POST /api/backup/import - Returns per-collection insert/skip counts
UI: DB Backup page loads with data-testid='db-backup-page'
UI: Export Database card shows total records count
UI: Export Backup button triggers .json file download
UI: Import Database card with Select Backup File button
UI: Collections panel shows all 12 collection counts
UI: Selecting .json file opens import preview dialog
UI: Import dialog shows record counts per collection
UI: Import dialog has merge/replace radio options
UI: Replace mode shows red warning message
UI: Import results show per-collection insert/skip counts
UI: Refresh Stats button works correctly

backup_download.response: JSON file with all 12 collections + metadata

backup_import.merge_mode: Adds new records, skips duplicates by id or name
backup_import.replace_mode: Wipes collection and replaces with backup data

frontend_ui.export_card: data-testid='backup-download-card' with total records and Export Backup button
frontend_ui.import_card: data-testid='backup-import-card' with Select Backup File button
frontend_ui.import_dialog: Shows file info, record preview, merge/replace options, warning for replace mode

fix_applied.issue: Collections panel was missing agent_targets collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: DB Backup Export/Import feature fully tested and working. Export downloads all 12 collections as JSON. Import supports merge (add new, skip duplicates) and replace (wipe and overwrite) modes. Non-admin users get 403 on all backup endpoints. Frontend shows preview dialog with record counts before import. All data-testid attributes working correctly for testing.
